coverage_note: Second expansion batch: additional US state privacy laws, sector privacy and data-security laws, EU/UK transfer and regulator norms, and selected APAC/Canada/Australia rules.

records.title: Florida Digital Bill of Rights
records.summary: Florida's state privacy framework aimed at large digital businesses, with consumer rights, targeted advertising and sale opt-outs, sensitive-data controls, and child-data provisions.
key_obligations: Support consumer privacy rights and appeals where applicable.
Disclose processing purposes and sale or targeted-advertising practices.
Apply sensitive-data and child-data controls under the statute.

records.title: Maryland Online Data Privacy Act
records.official_citation: Maryland Online Data Privacy Act of 2024
records.summary: Maryland comprehensive privacy law effective October 1, 2025, with strong data-minimization, sensitive-data, sale, targeted-advertising, and consumer-rights provisions.
key_obligations: Limit collection to reasonably necessary and proportionate personal data.
Support rights to know, correct, delete, portability, and opt out.
Apply heightened limits for sensitive data and minors' data.

records.title: Maryland Kids Code
records.summary: Maryland age-appropriate-design law for covered online products likely to be accessed by children, focused on children's privacy and harmful data practices.
key_obligations: Assess whether services are likely to be accessed by children.
Configure privacy-protective defaults and limit child data processing.
Avoid design and data practices that conflict with children's best interests.

records.title: Minnesota Consumer Data Privacy Act
records.summary: Minnesota privacy law effective July 31, 2025, providing consumer rights, transparency, opt-outs, sensitive-data requirements, and profiling-related controls.
key_obligations: Provide privacy notices and consumer rights mechanisms.
Support opt-outs for sale, targeted advertising, and certain profiling.
Conduct and retain data protection assessments where required.

records.title: Rhode Island Data Transparency and Privacy Protection Act
records.official_citation: Rhode Island Data Transparency and Privacy Protection Act
keywords: Rhode Island Data Transparency and Privacy Protection Act
records.summary: Rhode Island comprehensive privacy law effective January 1, 2026, with consumer rights, notice, controller duties, and transparency obligations.
key_obligations: Provide notice of processing and third-party disclosures.
Support consumer rights and opt-outs.
Handle sensitive data under consent and transparency requirements.

records.title: Kentucky Consumer Data Protection Act
records.summary: Kentucky comprehensive privacy law effective January 1, 2026, giving consumers rights and setting controller and processor duties.
key_obligations: Support access, correction, deletion, portability, and opt-out rights.
Provide privacy notice and appeal mechanisms.
Use processor contracts and assessments for high-risk processing.

records.title: Alabama Personal Data Protection Act
records.summary: Alabama comprehensive consumer privacy law enacted in 2026, with personal-data rights and controller obligations.
key_obligations: Track effective-date and applicability thresholds before launch in Alabama.
Implement rights, notice, opt-out, and sensitive-data workflows.
Maintain controller/processor compliance evidence.

records.title: Washington My Health My Data Act
records.summary: Washington consumer health data law with consent, rights, deletion, sharing restrictions, and geofencing limits.
key_obligations: Identify consumer health data broadly, including inferred health data.
Obtain consent for collection/sharing and authorization for sale where required.
Support access, deletion, and consent-withdrawal workflows.

records.title: Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act
records.summary: Illinois biometric privacy law requiring notice, written release, retention schedules, and restrictions on biometric identifiers and information.
key_obligations: Provide written notice and obtain written release before collection.
Publish retention and destruction policy.
Restrict sale, disclosure, and safeguarding of biometric data.

records.title: New York SHIELD Act
records.official_citation: Stop Hacks and Improve Electronic Data Security Act
records.summary: New York data security law requiring reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards for private information.
key_obligations: Maintain reasonable security safeguards.
Assess vendors and service providers.
Coordinate with New York breach-notification obligations.

records.title: Massachusetts Standards for the Protection of Personal Information
records.summary: Massachusetts regulation requiring a written information security program and safeguards for personal information of Massachusetts residents.
key_obligations: Maintain a written information security program.
Use administrative, technical, and physical safeguards.
Oversee service providers and access controls.

records.title: Nevada Online Privacy Law
records.summary: Nevada online privacy law requiring privacy notices and sale opt-out mechanisms for covered operators.
key_obligations: Publish required online privacy notice.
Provide sale opt-out request address where applicable.
Track covered-information categories and third-party sharing.

records.title: California Consumer Privacy Act Regulations
records.summary: California regulations implementing CCPA/CPRA notice, request, opt-out, sensitive personal information, dark pattern, and enforcement rules.
key_obligations: Implement detailed notice-at-collection and privacy-policy requirements.
Honor opt-out preference signals and rights requests.
Avoid dark-pattern consent and choice designs.

records.title: California Delete Act
records.summary: California data-broker law creating additional registration and deletion obligations, including a centralized deletion mechanism.
key_obligations: Assess data-broker registration obligations.
Prepare for centralized deletion request handling.
Maintain auditable deletion and opt-out workflows.

records.title: FTC Health Breach Notification Rule
records.summary: FTC breach-notification rule for vendors of personal health records and related entities not covered by HIPAA breach rules.
key_obligations: Determine whether health-app or PHR data triggers HBNR.
Notify individuals, FTC, and media where required.
Track breach investigation and notification timelines.

records.title: CAN-SPAM Act and Rule
records.summary: US commercial email law and FTC rule covering accurate sender information, advertising identification, and opt-out handling.
key_obligations: Avoid deceptive headers and subject lines.
Include required sender identification and opt-out mechanism.
Honor opt-out requests within required timeframes.

records.title: EU Standard Contractual Clauses for International Transfers
records.summary: EU modular SCCs for transfers of personal data to third countries under GDPR Chapter V.
key_obligations: Select the correct SCC module for transfer role pairings.
Perform transfer impact assessments where required.
Flow down onward-transfer and processor obligations.

records.title: EU-US Data Privacy Framework Adequacy Decision
records.summary: EU adequacy decision enabling certain transfers to certified US organisations under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.
key_obligations: Verify recipient certification before relying on DPF.
Document transfer mechanism and scope.
Monitor onward-transfer and certification status.

records.title: EDPB Guidelines on Consent under GDPR
records.summary: EDPB guidance explaining valid GDPR consent, including freely given, specific, informed, unambiguous, explicit consent, and withdrawal.
key_obligations: Avoid bundled or coerced consent.
Make withdrawal as easy as giving consent.
Keep consent records and separate consent from contract acceptance.

records.title: Article 29 Working Party / EDPB Transparency Guidelines
records.summary: EU guidance on transparent information, communication, and modalities for data subject rights under GDPR.
key_obligations: Use concise, intelligible, easily accessible privacy information.
Layer notices for complex processing.
Tailor child-facing notices to child comprehension.

records.title: EDPB Guidelines on Personal Data Breach Notification
records.official_citation: Guidelines 9/2022 on personal data breach notification under GDPR
records.summary: EDPB guidance on GDPR personal data breach notification to supervisory authorities and affected individuals.
key_obligations: Assess breach risk promptly and document decisions.
Notify supervisory authority within 72 hours where required.
Communicate high-risk breaches to affected individuals.

records.title: UK International Data Transfer Agreement and Addendum
records.official_citation: International Data Transfer Agreement and International Data Transfer Addendum
records.summary: UK transfer mechanisms for restricted transfers under UK GDPR, including IDTA and UK Addendum to EU SCCs.
key_obligations: Select IDTA or UK Addendum for restricted transfers.
Perform transfer risk assessment.
Maintain transfer documentation and onward-transfer controls.

records.title: Direct Marketing Code of Practice
records.summary: ICO code and guidance on direct marketing under UK GDPR and PECR.
key_obligations: Identify lawful basis and PECR consent rules before marketing.
Honor unsubscribe and objection rights.
Assess profiling and enrichment used for marketing.

records.title: Canada Anti-Spam Legislation
records.official_citation: An Act to promote the efficiency and adaptability of the Canadian economy by regulating certain activities that discourage reliance on electronic means
records.summary: Canadian anti-spam law regulating commercial electronic messages, installation of computer programs, consent, identification, and unsubscribe mechanisms.
key_obligations: Obtain express or implied consent for commercial electronic messages.
Include required identification and unsubscribe information.
Track consent evidence and unsubscribe requests.

records.title: Digital Charter Implementation Act, 2022 (Bill C-27)
records.summary: Canadian federal privacy and AI bill package proposed to replace PIPEDA with CPPA and create AI governance rules; track as non-enacted unless status changes.
key_obligations: Do not treat as enacted law until legislative status changes.
Use as roadmap for future CPPA/AIDA requirements.
Monitor automated decision and AI governance proposals.

records.title: Australian Privacy Principles Guidelines
records.authority: Office of the Australian Information Commissioner
records.summary: OAIC guidance interpreting the Australian Privacy Principles under the Privacy Act.
key_obligations: Use APP Guidelines to interpret collection notice, use, disclosure, access, correction, and security duties.
Check APP 8 for cross-border disclosure.
Apply APP 11 for security and retention.

records.title: Notifiable Data Breaches Scheme
records.authority: Office of the Australian Information Commissioner
records.summary: Australian breach-notification scheme requiring notification of eligible data breaches under the Privacy Act.
key_obligations: Assess suspected breaches for likely serious harm.
Notify OAIC and affected individuals for eligible breaches.
Maintain incident response and evidence records.

records.title: PDPC Advisory Guidelines on Key Concepts in the PDPA
records.official_citation: Advisory Guidelines on Key Concepts in the PDPA
records.summary: Singapore PDPC guidance explaining core PDPA concepts and obligations.
key_obligations: Use PDPC guidance to interpret consent, notification, purpose limitation, and transfer duties.
Assess deemed consent and exceptions carefully.
Maintain accountable data-protection practices.

records.title: Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance
records.summary: Hong Kong personal data privacy ordinance based on data protection principles, rights, direct marketing rules, and PCPD enforcement.
key_obligations: Follow data protection principles for collection, use, retention, security, openness, and access/correction.
Provide personal information collection statements.
Comply with direct marketing consent and opt-out requirements.

records.title: PCPD Guidance on Data Breach Handling and Notification
records.authority: Privacy Commissioner for Personal Data Hong Kong
records.official_citation: Guidance on Data Breach Handling and Data Breach Notifications
records.summary: Hong Kong PCPD guidance on handling data breaches and notifying affected individuals and the Commissioner.
key_obligations: Assess breach severity and containment steps.
Consider notification to PCPD and affected individuals.
Document response and remedial measures.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Act 2010
records.authority: Department of Personal Data Protection Malaysia
records.summary: Malaysia private-sector personal data law with seven data protection principles, rights, transfer restrictions, and sectoral codes.
key_obligations: Comply with general, notice and choice, disclosure, security, retention, data integrity, and access principles.
Provide notices and access/correction rights.
Assess cross-border transfers and processing by data users.

records.title: Data Privacy Act of 2012
records.summary: Philippine data privacy law covering personal information controllers and processors, lawful processing, rights, security, breach, and NPC enforcement.
key_obligations: Identify lawful criteria for processing personal and sensitive personal information.
Register or notify where NPC rules require.
Implement privacy management, security, and breach response.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Decree
records.official_citation: Decree No. 13/2023/ND-CP on Personal Data Protection
records.summary: Vietnam personal data protection decree with consent, rights, sensitive data, impact assessment, cross-border transfer, and breach obligations.
key_obligations: Obtain valid consent and provide processing notices.
Prepare personal data processing impact assessments where required.
Meet cross-border transfer documentation and notification expectations.

records.title: AAIP Guide for Public and Private Entities on Personal Data Protection
records.authority: Agencia de Acceso a la Información Pública
records.summary: AAIP guidance and regulator materials for applying Argentina's personal data protection law.
key_obligations: Use regulator materials to interpret notice, consent, rights, security, and transfer duties.
Track AAIP criteria for databases and sensitive data.
Maintain compliance evidence for regulator requests.

records.title: Regulations to the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties
records.official_citation: Reglamento de la Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales en Posesión de los Particulares
records.summary: Mexican implementing regulation detailing privacy notices, consent, ARCO rights, transfers, security, and data-controller obligations.
key_obligations: Implement detailed privacy notice and consent requirements.
Support ARCO rights procedures.
Control transfers and processor relationships.
